subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Mulla Abdur-Rahim
subcodes.first_line: This evanescent servant submitteth that thy letter was received, and from the wondrous words and gems [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معروض میدارد این عبد فانی که مکتوب آنجناب واصل شد و از بدایع کلمات و جواهر
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @stories; anecdotes, @regarding the receptivity of the hearer in teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @belief and denial, @station of the Manifestation of God, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
